developer_response.body:
I understand the frustration, unfortunately as of now, I haven't found a solution to this problem other than:

1. After launching the app for the first time, quit and restart the app

2. If it takes longer than 30s-1 min then restart again

3. If you manage to load in for the first time, it'll load quicker from then on

I hope this helps with future players wanting to play my game.
